display.purpose: Page titles only; one per screen at most.

title.purpose: Panel, modal, and card headers; feature names.

body.purpose: Default text: rows, comments, form values.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, attribute keys. The chrome workhorse.

caption.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, section headers. Stone Gray.

mono.purpose: Machine values: IDs, file names, numbers, coordinates.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Panels and control clusters floating above the map.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Modals and mobile bottom sheets, always over a dim overlay.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 18px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default for every action that isn't the primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #1c1917; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 18px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #dc2626; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 18px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { filter: brightness(0.92); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: 36px field with leading icon; focus swaps hairline for a 2px indigo ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; width: 320px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 12px; } .ds-input:focus-within { border: 2px solid #4f46e5; padding: 0 11px; } .ds-input input { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: #1c1917; } .ds-input input::placeholder { color: #78716c; }

components.name: Filter Chip (selected)
components.description: Selected filter: Indigo Mist fill, indigo border and text.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; margin-right: 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; background: transparent; color: #78716c; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 18px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip-filter:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-chip-filter.ds-selected { background: #eef2ff; border-color: #4f46e5; color: #4f46e5; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Comment status with leading dot: indigo open, amber in-review.
components.html: OpenIn review
components.css: .ds-chip-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; margin-right: 8px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; color: #1c1917; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 18px; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Floating Panel
components.description: The container for Search / Layers / Comments / Warnings, floating over the map.
components.html:
Search

RESULTS
components.css: .ds-panel { width: 320px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 26px; color: #1c1917; } .ds-panel-caption { margin: 12px 0 0; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; color: #78716c; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: List Row
components.description: 58px result row: flat, Chip Stone hover, Indigo Mist selected.
components.html:
Station Shop
occupant · 1F
改札口
gate · 1F
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 58px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-row:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-row.ds-row-selected { background: #eef2ff; } .ds-row-title { font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: #1c1917; } .ds-row-meta { font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; color: #78716c; }

components.name: Floor Stack
components.description: Signature map control: floor buttons, active floor in Ai Indigo.
components.css: .ds-floors { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 4px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .ds-floor { width: 40px; height: 36px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1c1917; cursor: pointer; } .ds-floor:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-floor.ds-active { background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; }

narrative.overview: Kiriko (切子) is named for Edo Kiriko cut glass, and the interface behaves like it: a precise, calm craft object where clarity is the whole point. Surfaces are quiet — warm stone neutrals under crisp white panels — and every line is a deliberate facet: 1px hairline borders, exact attribute tables, small confident labels. The one saturated color, a deep ai (藍) indigo, appears the way indigo appears in the glass — sparingly, and always meaning something. The map is the product; UI chrome floats above it on structural shadows and otherwise stays out of the way.
keyCharacteristics: Warm stone neutrals; white panels; a single indigo voice
Hairline precision: 1px borders, exact values, small type
Panels float over the map on two structural shadow levels
Japanese and English typeset as peers (Inter + Noto Sans JP)
Data values in mono; chrome recedes, data leads

rules.name: The One Indigo Rule
rules.body: Ai Indigo is the only voice in the room — it marks interaction and selection and covers well under 10% of any screen. If indigo appears on something that can't be clicked or isn't selected, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are 1px Hairline (#E7E5E4), full-perimeter, or absent. No 2px borders (except the focused input's Ai Indigo ring), no colored side-stripes, no double borders.

rules.name: The Mono Data Rule
rules.body: Machine values (SHP-1042, JRShinjukuSta.gdb, 42.5, hex IDs) are always IBM Plex Mono. Prose is never mono. The split is what makes attribute tables scannable.

rules.name: The Float Rule
rules.body: Shadow = layer above the map, nothing else. If an element sits in the page flow, it gets a hairline border, not a shadow. Two shadows exist; there is no third.

dos: Do keep Ai Indigo under 10% of any screen — it marks interaction and selection only.
Do use 1px Hairline full-perimeter borders for in-flow separation; reserve shadows for elements floating above the map.
Do set machine values — IDs, file names, numbers — in IBM Plex Mono.
Do test every label and layout with Japanese and English strings; line-height ≥ 1.35 wherever CJK can appear.
Do keep text at AA contrast: Sumi Ink or Stone Gray on white, nothing lighter.
Do give every interactive element a visible focus state and a 44px touch target on mobile.
donts: Don't drift toward desktop GIS: no toolbar forests, no dockable panel mazes, no settings-dense chrome.
Don't build the generic SaaS dashboard: no stat cards, no gradient heroes, no marketing chrome inside the product.
Don't import heavy-enterprise weight (the ACC feel): no deep nav trees, no multi-level breadcrumbs, no permission bureaucracy in the UI.
Don't add a third shadow, a colored side-stripe border, gradient text, or glassmorphism.
Don't let map-layer colors compete with Ai Indigo — selection must always be the most saturated thing on the canvas.
Don't exceed 24px type anywhere in the app UI. The interface never shouts.
